title: Simple GATT Client App
description: Android BLE GATT client with 3 services: Temperature (read only), Battery Service (read/write/notify), User Data (read/write). Compose UI with service cards, feature badges, write TextFields, and notification log.

stories.title: BLE Permissions & Dependencies
acceptanceCriteria: AndroidManifest.xml declares BLUETOOTH, BLUETOOTH_ADMIN, ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION (pre-S), BLUETOOTH_SCAN, BLUETOOTH_CONNECT permissions

stories.title: BLE Core Layer
acceptanceCriteria: BleManager.kt exposes scanResults, connState, readValues, notifLogs, notifEnabled as MutableStateFlow
Handles both API 33+ and pre-33 deprecated GATT callbacks
BleVM wraps BleManager and exposes devices, isScanning StateFlows

stories.title: Scan Screen
acceptanceCriteria: ScanScreen with Start/Stop Scan button and scanning indicator
Discovered devices in Card list with name and address
Tapping device calls vm.connect(); auto-shows DeviceScreen

stories.title: Device Screen with Service Cards
acceptanceCriteria: DeviceScreen shows device name, Connected status, Disconnect button
Three ServiceCard items for Temperature, Battery Service, User Data
Temperature: READ badge only; Battery: READ+WRITE+NOTIFY; User Data: READ+WRITE

stories.title: Read & Write & Notify UX
acceptanceCriteria: All 3 cards have Read button; value displayed after callback
Battery Service and User Data have OutlinedTextField + Send button; Temperature does not
Battery Service has Notifications Switch + timestamped log of last 5 entries
Build: assembleDebug SUCCESS with 0 errors, 0 warnings
